posts.purpose: スタンプ制作データ ①
posts.content: 暑いから、無理しないでね
posts.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling, visible brush bleeding at the edges. Deep turquoise and sun yellow with shell beige — the hazy heat of a midsummer afternoon. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful gaze, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle with olive watercolor rings on shell) fans herself gently with a tiny round paper uchiwa held between her front flippers, eyes soft with quiet concern. Composition: close-up, bust-up, front view, large copy space at top center.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『暑いから、無理しないでね』naturally placed within the illustration at top center, not overlapping her face; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, clean edge cutout, LINE sticker style, market-ready polish.
posts.quote: 💎 第16弾・⑯-01 | 全時間帯 | キャラのみ（ディープターコイズ・サンイエロー）
